targets.queryText: SELECT observed_at, tick, room_name, metric_name, value, source_artifact FROM metric_observations WHERE metric_name IN ('survival.owned_rooms','survival.owned_spawns','survival.claimed_room_without_spawn_age_ticks') ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 200;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT observed_at, tick, room_name, metric_name, value, source_artifact FROM metric_observations WHERE metric_name IN ('survival.owned_rooms','survival.owned_spawns','survival.claimed_room_without_spawn_age_ticks') ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 200;

targets.queryText: SELECT observed_at AS time, room_name || ':' || metric_name AS metric, value FROM metric_observations WHERE metric_name IN ('economy.energy_available','economy.stored_energy','economy.worker_carried_energy') ORDER BY observed_at;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT observed_at AS time, room_name || ':' || metric_name AS metric, value FROM metric_observations WHERE metric_name IN ('economy.energy_available','economy.stored_energy','economy.worker_carried_energy') ORDER BY observed_at;

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT first_seen_at, severity, room_name, finding_key, evidence_json, recommendation FROM gameplay_behavior_findings WHERE category = 'stalled-construction' ORDER BY first_seen_at DESC LIMIT 50;

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT observed_at, tick, room_name, metric_name, value, evidence_json FROM metric_observations WHERE metric_name IN ('creep.worker_count','creep.low_load_return_count','creep.return_load_factor','creep.idle_count','creep.stuck_ticks','behavior.upgrade_dominance_ratio') ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 250;

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT first_seen_at, severity, category, room_name, evidence_json, recommendation FROM gameplay_behavior_findings WHERE category IN ('low-load-return','stuck-actionless','upgrade-dominant-backlog') ORDER BY first_seen_at DESC LIMIT 100;

panels.title: RL Dataset, Training, And Policy Metrics

targets.queryText: SELECT observed_at, severity, metric_name, category, room_name, tick, gap_type, message, source_artifact FROM metric_coverage_gaps ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 250;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT observed_at, severity, metric_name, category, room_name, tick, gap_type, message, source_artifact FROM metric_coverage_gaps ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 250;

targets.queryText: SELECT metric_name, severity, COUNT(*) AS gap_count FROM metric_coverage_gaps GROUP BY metric_name, severity ORDER BY gap_count DESC, metric_name LIMIT 100;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT metric_name, severity, COUNT(*) AS gap_count FROM metric_coverage_gaps GROUP BY metric_name, severity ORDER BY gap_count DESC, metric_name LIMIT 100;

targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(build_blocked_reason, 'missing') AS buildBlockedReason, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM runtime_room_metrics GROUP BY COALESCE(build_blocked_reason, 'missing') ORDER BY sample_count DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(build_blocked_reason, 'missing') AS buildBlockedReason, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM runtime_room_metrics GROUP BY COALESCE(build_blocked_reason, 'missing') ORDER BY sample_count DESC;

targets.queryText: SELECT observed_at AS time, room_name || ':extensions' AS metric, extension_count AS value FROM runtime_room_metrics WHERE extension_count IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT observed_at AS time, room_name || ':extensionCapacity' AS metric, extension_capacity_contribution AS value FROM runtime_room_metrics WHERE extension_capacity_contribution IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT observed_at AS time, room_name || ':extensions' AS metric, extension_count AS value FROM runtime_room_metrics WHERE extension_count IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT observed_at AS time, room_name || ':extensionCapacity' AS metric, extension_capacity_contribution AS value FROM runtime_room_metrics WHERE extension_capacity_contribution IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time;

targets.queryText: SELECT observed_at AS time, room_name || ':pathFindingFailures' AS metric, path_finding_failures AS value FROM runtime_room_metrics WHERE path_finding_failures IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT observed_at AS time, room_name || ':destinationBlocked' AS metric, destination_blocked AS value FROM runtime_room_metrics WHERE destination_blocked IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT observed_at AS time, room_name || ':pathFindingFailures' AS metric, path_finding_failures AS value FROM runtime_room_metrics WHERE path_finding_failures IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT observed_at AS time, room_name || ':destinationBlocked' AS metric, destination_blocked AS value FROM runtime_room_metrics WHERE destination_blocked IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time;

targets.queryText: SELECT observed_at, tick, room_name, worker_load_trip_energy_mean AS tripEnergyMean, worker_load_trip_energy_min AS tripEnergyMin, source_artifact FROM runtime_room_metrics WHERE worker_load_trip_energy_mean IS NOT NULL OR worker_load_trip_energy_min IS NOT NULL ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 250;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT observed_at, tick, room_name, worker_load_trip_energy_mean AS tripEnergyMean, worker_load_trip_energy_min AS tripEnergyMin, source_artifact FROM runtime_room_metrics WHERE worker_load_trip_energy_mean IS NOT NULL OR worker_load_trip_energy_min IS NOT NULL ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 250;

targets.queryText: SELECT observed_at, tick, room_name, controller_progress_ratio AS controllerProgressRatio, upgrade_carried_energy AS upgradeCarriedEnergy, import_demand AS importDemand, blocked_import_energy AS blockedImportEnergy, multi_room_deficit_energy AS multiRoomDeficitEnergy, source_artifact FROM runtime_room_metrics WHERE controller_progress_ratio IS NOT NULL OR upgrade_carried_energy IS NOT NULL OR import_demand IS NOT NULL OR blocked_import_energy IS NOT NULL OR multi_room_deficit_energy IS NOT NULL ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 250;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT observed_at, tick, room_name, controller_progress_ratio AS controllerProgressRatio, upgrade_carried_energy AS upgradeCarriedEnergy, import_demand AS importDemand, blocked_import_energy AS blockedImportEnergy, multi_room_deficit_energy AS multiRoomDeficitEnergy, source_artifact FROM runtime_room_metrics WHERE controller_progress_ratio IS NOT NULL OR upgrade_carried_energy IS NOT NULL OR import_demand IS NOT NULL OR blocked_import_energy IS NOT NULL OR multi_room_deficit_energy IS NOT NULL ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 250;

targets.queryText: SELECT created_at, decision_key, status, rationale, source_artifact FROM metric_iteration_decisions ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT created_at, decision_key, status, rationale, source_artifact FROM metric_iteration_decisions ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100;

targets.queryText: SELECT observed_at, metric_name, value, source_artifact FROM metric_observations WHERE metric_name = 'source.rl_metrics_refresh.completed' ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 20;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT observed_at, metric_name, value, source_artifact FROM metric_observations WHERE metric_name = 'source.rl_metrics_refresh.completed' ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 20;
